## Summary

Describe the change and the user or operator outcome.

## Domains Touched

- [ ] Payments API
- [ ] Ledger and balances
- [ ] Fraud scoring and review
- [ ] Operator console
- [ ] Reconciliation and observability
- [ ] Docs, tooling, or governance

## Control Checklist

- [ ] Ledger postings remain balanced and immutable.
- [ ] Payment API behavior remains idempotent for retried requests.
- [ ] Audit history and operator evidence remain intact.
- [ ] Reconciliation, settlement, or fraud-review side effects are covered.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` is updated.
- [ ] The nearest relevant documentation is updated in the same branch.

## Validation

List the tests, manual checks, or replay/verification steps you ran.
